findings.evidence: `rg -n "fixing_def|relBoundary_def" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Action.lean` has no hits; lines 118 and 124 define the wrappers, while lines 130 and 141 provide only `fixing_eq_fixingSubgroup` and `relBoundary_eq_fixing`.
findings.fix: Add canonical `_def` restatements, e.g. `fixing_def : fixing I M n s = fixingSubgroup (Diff I M n) s` and `relBoundary_def : relBoundary I M n = fixing I M n (I.boundary M)`, or rename the existing theorems to those names.
findings.issue: `Diff.fixing` and `Diff.relBoundary` are public definitions, but the API has no `Diff.fixing_def` or `Diff.relBoundary_def`; only ad hoc `fixing_eq_fixingSubgroup` and `relBoundary_eq_fixing` names are provided.

summary: The new public wrappers expose the intended subgroup API, but they still lack the required conventional `_def` restatements for downstream rewriting/discovery.
